name: Bacon, Avocado & Cheese Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the beaten eggs, water, melted margarine, cooked and crumbled bacon, peeled and cubed avocados, and grated Monterey Jack cheese.
2. Pour the mixture into a foil-lined, greased Dutch oven and bake at 375°F until set.
Salsa:
In a medium pot, combine finely chopped tomatoes, onions, chopped jalapeno peppers, minced garlic, ground coriander, lemon juice, caraway seeds, cumin, and red pepper flakes. Stir well.
Serve the salsa as a topping for each serving of omelet.
